data.title: Consistency and Standards
data.description: Follows a consistent layout and design standard across all pages.

data.title: User Control and Freedom
data.description: Provides users with options to undo actions and navigate freely.

data.title: Aesthetic and Minimalist Design
data.description: Maintains a clean and focused design, avoiding unnecessary information.

data.title: Error Prevention
data.description: Design includes measures to prevent errors before they happen.

data.title: Recognition Rather than Recall
data.description: User interface design reduces cognitive load by making objects, actions, and options visible.
